chunks.text: The Path of the Blind Watchmaker: A Model of Evolution (EECS-2011-76) Andrew Anthony Poggio, David A. Patterson, Adam Arkin, Brent Mishler and Christos Papadimitriou

chunks.answer: The Path of the Blind Watchmaker: A Model of Evolution (EECS-2011-76)
